title: On-Foot Crimes
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CommitCrime WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND CrimeType IN ('assault', 'murder', 'manslaughter', 'onFoot_murder', 'onFoot_assault')
detailQuery: SELECT CrimeType AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CommitCrime WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND CrimeType IN ('assault', 'murder', 'manslaughter', 'onFoot_murder', 'onFoot_assault') GROUP BY CrimeType ORDER BY value DESC
